intents.name: book_flight
examples: Book a flight to Delhi
I want to travel to Mumbai tomorrow
Get me a ticket to Chennai next week
Can you book a flight to Bengaluru for Friday?
I need a ticket from Mumbai to Chennai next month
Find me a cheap flight to Delhi tonight
Reserve a seat on a morning flight to Kolkata
I want to fly to Hyderabad this weekend
I need to catch a plane to Pune
Book me the earliest flight to Jaipur
Is there a flight to Ahmedabad this evening?
I want to go to Goa next Friday

intents.name: order_food
examples: Order me a pizza
I want to eat biryani
Get me a burger
Can you order Chinese food for me?
I want to order a large pepperoni pizza
Please get me two plates of biryani
Order a burger and fries combo
I feel like eating paneer tikka
Get me some noodles
I want a masala dosa
Can you bring me a samosa?
I am hungry, order some pasta

intents.name: check_weather
examples: What is the weather in Delhi today?
Will it rain in Mumbai tomorrow?
Show me the weather forecast for Chennai
Is it hot in Bengaluru right now?
How cold will it be in Hyderabad this weekend?
Tell me the temperature in Kolkata today
What is the forecast for Pune this week?
Is it going to be sunny in Jaipur tomorrow?
How is the weather in Goa right now?
Will there be any storms in Ahmedabad tonight?

intents.name: greet

Hello
Hey there
Good morning
Good evening
What's up?
Hey bot
Hi, how are you?
Good afternoon
Hey, what is up?
Howdy
